title: Galician-Style Banana Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy dessert inspired by traditional Galician cuisine. Fried banana fritters, perfect for a quick dessert.

ingredients.name: Salmorejo
ingredients.notes: diluted with milk to a thick batter

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt. Stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the beaten egg, diluted salmorejo, and a splash of milk.
Peel the bananas and slice them into 1-inch rounds.
Dip each banana slice into the egg mixture, then coat in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat until it reaches 350°F.
Fry the banana fritters in batches until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm, dust with powdered sugar, and enjoy!
